final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear, readable focal element centered
Subject: must include visual references to the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle/everyday goods — balanced and harmonious as a unified icon
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, approachable, energetic atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that feels contemporary and cross-culturally neutral — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and inoffensive across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative or taboo connotations in major global cultures
Avoid: must avoid political symbols, religious iconography, culturally sensitive color combinations (e.g., pure white-only or pure black-only mourning associations), offensive gestures, or any imagery that could alienate specific cultural groups
